reviews.review_title: You guys need to figure out who did this

developer_response.body: Please Appeal the ban

reviews.review_description: After playing this game for 1-2 weeks all ive seen in this game are really nice players and some racist players but its fine and i met the playfab manager roneeclipse and became friends with him! So in my opinion this game is a 9.7/10 for me also really good music game deserves more recognition.
Cookie banned me because I jumped and everyone said wooowww and I said what and they told cookie I did something weird but I jumped and landed on cookie
It’s annoying how far you have to travel to get to anything. Most things aren’t even visible to know where they are unless you come across them or someone in game shows you the location. Meh
I said i was going to touch him and banned me right after i said sorry and correct myself

Me and my friend were playing this game and then one of the devs spam reported me and my friend and got banned for absolutely no freaking reason. Overall the game is good but the moderation is terrible.
It’s a fun game, but people get you banned for no reason
i got banned 2 times for no reason
One of those dumb moderators banned me for punching him Smh now I can't play pls unban

developer_response.body: Just appeal normally and say you won’t do it again, acting toxic won’t help you get unbanned.

reviews.review_description: They banned me for because the code was racist but it was a spam code get new devs they all suck

I cant join codes it says “error“and numbers i forgot and i cant do anything like join codes and stuff when i met the owner sky,he equipped a accecory and i got kicked from the game and yeah pls unban me i didnt do anything

developer_response.body: The error you’re seeing sounds like a bug, but it isn’t what caused your ban. You were removed for a rules violation. If you want us to review it, you can submit an appeal.
